title: ErrorResponse
description: Error response with PostgreSQL error fields.

code.description: PostgreSQL error code (SQLSTATE) or application error code.

hint.description: Optional hint for resolving the error.

position.description: Character position in the query where the error occurred.

where.description: Context in which the error occurred.

schema.description: Schema name related to the error.

table.description: Table name related to the error.

column.description: Column name related to the error.

dataType.description: Data type name related to the error.

constraint.description: Constraint name related to the error.

file.description: Source file where the error was reported (server-side).

line.description: Source line where the error was reported (server-side).

routine.description: Source routine where the error was reported (server-side).
